description: T2-vault content repository for spectral entities, spectral moods, and high-intensity events derived from high CIC/MDI/AOS history layers.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: Vault may contain explicit spectral narratives and high-intensity content; subject to internal gating and Dead-Ledger governance.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All spectral moods, entities, events, and region cards must include a valid schemaRef pointing to an approved schema.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: All artifacts must include targetRepo, targetPath, objectKind, tier, and routingSpineRef metadata for routing and registry binding.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: All authoring requests that target this repo must resolve routes through spine/hpc-routing-spine-v1.json.

authoringHints.summary: Use this T2-vault to define spectral moods, spectral entities, and high-intensity events realized by runtime adapters in HorrorPlace-Codebase-of-Death.
aiBehavior: Only generate moodContract, spectralEntityContractCard, eventContractCard, and regionContractCard artifacts in this repo.
Always verify schemaRef against the schemaWhitelist before generating or modifying artifacts.
Tie spectral entities and events to regionContractCard IDs instead of embedding raw history text.
Tune invariants (CIC, AOS, SHCI, DET, SPR) and metrics (UEC, EMD, STCI, ARR) according to the routing spine and Dead-Ledger profiles.
Treat implicitDeny=true as a hard rule: no new objectKind may be introduced here without updating allowedObjectKinds and the routing spine.
